LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER WHEELER SUPPORTIVE SERVICES, INC.'S HEARING FOR ISSUANCE OF PEREMPTORY WRIT OF MANDATE IS DENIED. THE COURT DENIES THE PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE AND DAMAGES BECAUSE THE LANGUAGE IN 17 CCR 58660 (A) DOES NOT IMPOSE A DUTY ON THE REGIONAL CENTER TO INITIATE CONTRACTUAL NEGOTIATIONS WITH A SPECIFIC VENDOR OR TO ACCEPT A VENDOR'S REQUEST TO NEGOTIATE A RATE. THE LANGUAGE 17 CCR 58660 (B) CLEARLY PROVIDES THAT IT IS THE REGIONAL CENTER'S DECISION TO NEGOTIATE WITH A PARTICULAR VENDOR FOR THE SERVICES OUTLINED TITLE 17, SECTION 54349 (A) THROUGH (D), AND SPECIFIED IN SECTION 58614 (B). PETITIONER'S FAILURE TO PROVE THAT IT HAS A RIGHT TO CONTRACT WITH GOLDEN GATE REGIONAL CENTER PRECLUDES ITS CLAIM FOR CONTRACT DAMAGES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER : MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489 =302/AJR

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing For Issuance Of Peremptory Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Sep-28-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. CHAD CARLOCK, TEL. NO. 1-530-750-3000 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. RUFUS L. COLE, TEL. NO. 1-415-956-8800 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER WHEELER SUPPORTIVE SERVICES, INC'S Hearing For Issuance Of Peremptory Writ Of Mandate is denied. The court denies the petition for writ of mandate and damages because the language in 17 CCR 58660 (a) does not impose a duty on the regional center to initiate contractual negotiations with a specific vendor or to accept a vendor's request to negotiate a rate. The language 17 CCR 58660 (b) clearly provides that it is the regional center's decision to negotiate with a particular vendor for the services outlined Title 17, Section 54349 (a) through (d), and specified in Section 58614 (b). Petitioner's failure to prove that it has a right to contract with Golden Gate Regional Center precludes its claim for contract damages. Order signed in open court. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/ajr

Off Calendar Sep-15-2015 Continued To Sep-23-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER WHEELER SUPPORTIVE SERVICES, INC.'S Hearing For Issuance Of Peremptory Writ Of Mandate is continued to September 23, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion, to give Plaintiff Wheeler Supportive Services, Inc. the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff Wheeler Supportive Services, Inc. must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than September 15, 2015 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the [moving/opposition/reply] papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
